name: 💡 Feature / Protocol Enhancement
about: Suggest a new rule, command, workflow, or documentation improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 The Problem

**What engineering pain point does this solve?**
Describe the situation, e.g., "When using the `/e` command with Vue components, the 100-line limit is too restrictive for SFC files because..."

## 🏗️ Proposed Solution

**What rule / command / doc change would fix it?**
Be specific. Reference file names (e.g., `400-execution-iron-lock.mdc`) if relevant.

## 🎯 Which Protocol Layer?

- [ ] 100-Core (Identity & Language)
- [ ] 200-Research Gate
- [ ] 300-Planning Gate  
- [ ] 400-Execution Iron Lock
- [ ] New gate / command
- [ ] Documentation / Guide
- [ ] Templates

## 🤖 AI Tool Context

Which tool did you encounter this with?
- [ ] Cursor
- [ ] Claude
- [ ] ChatGPT
- [ ] GitHub Copilot
- [ ] Universal (all tools)

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria

How would we know this feature is working correctly?
- [ ] Criterion 1
